pages.title: Collecting Blood
pages.text: Vampire maids can be assigned the $(bold)Collect Blood$() task to actively search for nearby creatures and extract their blood into bottles.$(br2)$(bold)Requirements:$()$(br)$(li)The maid must be a vampire$(li)Glass bottles or unfilled blood bottles in the maid's inventory$(br2)$(bold)How it works:$()$(br)The maid will search for creatures within range, approach them, and extract blood to fill bottles. Full blood bottles (9/9) can be collected by the player for later use.

pages.title: Configuration
pages.text: The following can be configured:$(br2)$(li)$(bold)Search Range:$() How far the maid searches for targets (default: 16 blocks)$(li)$(bold)Extract Amount:$() Maximum blood extracted per action (default: 6)$(li)$(bold)Cooldown:$() Time between extraction actions (default: 1.5 seconds)$(br2)All settings can be adjusted in the mod configuration menu.
